# Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa. At first, I had no idea that sequels existed, and thought its originality was nonexistent, due to it being and looking like the original. I have this to be considered my least talked about movie yet, but maybe I have been too hard on it? SPOILERS!

Story
This is basically The Lion King, but DreamWorks style. Makunga is basically Scar, Zuba is Mufasa, the pride lands is where the 4 live. There is quite a lot of filler, along with Alex’s struggles as a lion. Marty thinking he is the same as everyone else, Melman becoming a doctor, Gloria being attracted to Moto Moto? I hated the third subplot, because WHY DOES MOTO MOTO EXIST?! However, I did not even like the main plot of Alex wanting to be a dancer, however his father wanting him to be an athlete. DID THAT NOT HAPPEN IN HIGH SCHOOL MUSICAL?! I also hate how the logic had no existence. How so, you ask? Zuba should have known Makunga’s motive, due to him being very obvious about it. Now, is it humorous? Yes. Does it have plenty of heart? Indeed. However, I straight-up dislike this story very much.
